summary: Admin Panel feature testing complete. All backend API tests passed (20/20). Frontend Admin Panel UI verified working correctly. Admin user (admin/@dm1n) can login with isAdmin: true, access admin endpoints, view stats, manage users (disable/enable, reset password, toggle features). Non-admin users correctly denied access (403) and don't see Admin tab in navigation.

minor.issue: Seed user 'rafael' has password 'admin' (5 chars) which doesn't meet the 6-char minimum validation requirement. Password was reset to 'admin1' during testing.

frontend_tests.admin_login: PASS - Admin can login with admin/@dm1n
frontend_tests.admin_tab_visible: PASS - Admin tab visible in sidebar for admin user
frontend_tests.admin_panel_loads: PASS - Admin panel component renders correctly
frontend_tests.stats_cards_visible: PASS - Shows Total Usuários, Ativos, Total Hábitos, Desativados
frontend_tests.users_list_visible: PASS - Users section with search and filter
frontend_tests.user_modal_works: PASS - Click user card opens detail modal
frontend_tests.action_buttons_present: PASS - Desativar/Ativar Usuário, Resetar Senha buttons
frontend_tests.feature_toggles_present: PASS - 4 feature toggles (Hábitos, Eventos, TARS, Amigos)
frontend_tests.non_admin_no_admin_tab: PASS - Admin tab NOT visible for non-admin users

action_items: Consider updating seed_users() to use passwords that meet validation requirements (6+ chars with letter and number)
critical_code_review_comments: Admin endpoints properly protected with get_admin_user dependency
Admin user created on startup via ensure_admin_exists()
isAdmin flag correctly returned in login response
Admin excluded from users list (cannot modify self)
Disabled users correctly blocked from login (403)
Google auth prioritizes google_id (sub) lookup before email
data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Rafael user password reset to 'admin1' (original 'admin' didn't meet validation)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel fully functional. Admin credentials: admin/@dm1n. Rafael user password changed to 'admin1' during testing. All admin endpoints require JWT token from admin login. Non-admin users get 403 on admin endpoints.

verified_features.admin_stats_endpoint: Working - Returns total_users, active_users, disabled_users, etc.
verified_features.admin_users_endpoint: Working - Returns paginated user list with stats
verified_features.admin_user_action_toggle_feature: Working - Toggles feature in disabledFeatures array
verified_features.admin_user_detail: Working - Returns detailed user info with data
verified_features.admin_tab_visibility: Working - Only visible to isAdmin users
